# https://www.robotstxt.org/robotstxt.html
# Finch-AI — finch-ai.it

User-agent: *
Allow: /
Disallow: /area-clienti/
Disallow: /en/area-clienti/
Disallow: /api/
Disallow: /*.json$

# Permetti esplicitamente l'indicizzazione delle risorse statiche (Google ne ha bisogno per il rendering)
Allow: /assets/
Allow: /*.css$
Allow: /*.js$
Allow: /*.png$
Allow: /*.jpg$
Allow: /*.jpeg$
Allow: /*.webp$
Allow: /*.svg$

# Bad bots / scrapers (best effort)
User-agent: GPTBot
Disallow: /area-clienti/
Disallow: /en/area-clienti/

User-agent: CCBot
Disallow: /area-clienti/
Disallow: /en/area-clienti/

User-agent: AhrefsBot
Crawl-delay: 10

User-agent: SemrushBot
Crawl-delay: 10

# Sitemap
Sitemap: https://finch-ai.it/sitemap.xml
